evals.description: Triggers on a survey design request
evals.prompt: I need to create a customer satisfaction survey for our SaaS product. Can you help me design one?

evals.description: Triggers on an interview guide request
evals.prompt: I need to run user interviews to understand why customers are churning. Help me build an interview guide.
Our NPS dropped from 42 to 35 this quarter. How should I analyze what's going on?

evals.description: Produces correct survey structure with question ordering
evals.prompt: Design a 10-question survey to understand why free trial users don't convert to paid plans.

evals.description: Correctly structures a semi-structured interview with time blocks
evals.prompt: Create a 45-minute interview script to understand how product managers use our analytics dashboard.

evals.description: Builds a data-driven persona with all required fields
evals.prompt: We've completed 12 user interviews and have survey data from 300 users. Help me build user personas.

evals.description: Correctly defines activation metrics and retention cohorts
evals.prompt: Help me set up behavioral analytics for our new mobile app. What metrics should I track and how do I measure retention?

evals.description: Produces a research plan with all required components
evals.prompt: We're launching a new enterprise feature. Write a research plan to validate demand before we build it.

evals.description: Catches leading question anti-pattern in survey review
evals.prompt: Review this survey question: 'Don't you agree that our onboarding experience is frustrating and needs improvement?'

evals.description: Warns against using NPS as the sole customer metric
evals.prompt: We're thinking of using NPS as our single source of truth for customer health. Is that a good idea?

evals.description: Does not invent fictional research tools or APIs
evals.prompt: How do I use the NPS Cloud API to automatically segment my detractors and send follow-up emails?

evals.description: References the personas reference file for detailed template
evals.prompt: I need a detailed persona template with all the fields and a worked example. Where can I find that?
